content: Thank you lol. I just won a match today because of this. If I didn't have impending I would have been screwed.

I don't think i can get to 3k this season.
Anytime I get a win, the gods above decide, 'Nuh-uh,' and smite me with a Helot nuke. I can’t wait for the season reset. She needs to be nerfed immediately.
So far, this team had been quite funny to counter whatever kind of team enemies throw
Alva is just a nuke of her own
Clem with corpo wheel for survival + fast exalt discard
Leigh + reunion to copy alva / clem cards or her own for more heal + dispel + arith limit
Helot with analysis of death to counter one shot team while intentionally dying to draw less of her cards
And with natural 110 hp she can tank quite a bit
If they try to para alva, delayed dispel from leigh is op af
I'm starting to get the clem hate
I hope you like having to dump your hand every turn <:Clown:1400771541423226971>
When I build this team for Aurita to shine but Lily had to make everything about her<:Stare:1400771552542199902>
Imagine an unit that can discard every cards your unit have just with a 2 cost
Force draw 5 cards 1 cost btw
And 15 bleed AoE
You can also reunion or lone seed clem 1 cost into 0 cost so you have a lot of bleed for absolutely free
And then discard the enemies cards with exalt + 2 cost

lag spikes making me misclick

1829 elo with this comp, although man im enjoying it less than poison

And clem just throw bleed and discard shit
latest version of my para/stag comp, tho i know its kinda bad because ive lost to bots with it before
im debating between lullaby (for strike bonus) or deathless ascent for more healing
There is another strat is with the wheel that give 1 STR everytime she get hit
And you celeste taunt on liz in case they try to discard your cards with clem
Very balanced

<:idk:1356084138280489080> the devs let clem stay with a kit like that for several patches, only now after the recent clem rerun and influx of player wanting 1st time rewards + nerfs of everybody that people see clem's kit being hard cancerous

i dont think alva caecus works well but i might be wrong (they're both essentially big damage tanks), pandia's speciality is letting characters exalt more often and add amplify to them, but none of your units have strong ults (all of them are utility ults instead of single/aoe nukes).
i think i would choose to keep one (alva or cae) and add in a unit with a strong ult to amplify in the back, the wheels im not sure, gluttony is nice though,
aged is ok, the rest idk.
possee are kinda bad, and the jenkin possee is mainly only good with arthi scaling nuke cards or exalts like liz's.
gluttony lily, my beloved
*50 all cast damage with a card*
delicious

then go for it haha, as soon as i hit the 3k i started going weird with the comps again c:
for all its worth u can still match 3.6k players while being 1200 so it doesnt rly matter
i wanna play pollux teams
pollux is WAY too fun
I made some absolute jank with Agrippa to try to reliably maintain entangle
but yeah I don't disrespect anyone wanting to climb
I wanna try Sin Mark teams but I didn't get Pollux's WoD
simply hitting people with Sin Marks until they die seems way more viable than actually removing them
yes! i like how he plays in both pvp and pve
they don't get removed in trap fortunately
which is very promising for upcoming characters
oh u cant remove them anymore?
Sin Marks are an indefinite status condition, but they can be cleansed
and for some reason I thought Pollux had a mechanic where he would detonate them for damage
at least when I used them today they never got removed from his kit
which also removes them
one of his exalt cards
He 'activates' them for passive damage equal to the amount
also they're just good to stack because -max hp
oh no theyre supposed to be a damage buff every hit on enemies that stack them, a little like castors in pve but without going down
It's hard for me to really remember because he puts about 40 of them on you and then nobody in the game can survive them being "activated"
seems good in status comps
because your health is now 40 lower
yeah they sadly can be removed by enemy teams now, which hibders his kit a lot because they are NOT as explosive as bleed or poison (used to be) for example
yeah that sounds a bit grim, esp when DoT is pretty big rn from what I recall
u could stack whole team 40-60 bleed turn 3 consistently with clem, liz and katya
since Horla and Jenkin and the like are all over the place
Knight WoD on Uvhash would be how I'd go about it
however i wanna play him before he gets buffed, which im hoping he does haha
I swapped to Uvhash ramp for the moment, but I still believe <:Prayge:877889394818842634>

he'd generally just reduce maximum health and also apply a bleed, so the turn after the bleed goes off, he Shrieks and you just fall over from a combination of having low max health from the Sin Marks and low current health because the bleed exploded at the end of your turn
jenkin has some insane low investment builds with only standard banner chars and wods
yeah I quite enjoyed messing with her!
very painful into Caecus and Wanda though
she is very fun but i mainly played her before i had a clue what i was doing and still found some degree of success xD

which seems like too much without some other support in there
or alva/tinct, unfortunately 1 stag on jenkin can completely break her mechanics
yeah I believe this
I would deadass just not ult if she had stag
u basically cant haha, otherwise u waste full exalt for like 5 cards that are balanced around being 0 cost
See this was what I suspected
it seemed way too situational
so u hold off ur big damage turn, then they cast one more stag the next turn and ure just like <:dead:1356082627509092372>
This is why arith ramp is so good <a:mynod:1133649807135752243>
but u could run her with doll or tinct which can help a lot
hm could do
I think it makes more sense to just use both as pressure rather than trying to combo hard with it
doll helps her not get nuked one turn too, since a lot of optimal teams that dont go the  AoE kill route can nuke 1 character at turn 3
but that makes it less precise a tool
definitely, but there was this comp, i did screenshot them, they were a high up jenkin comp with timeworn ramona, i queued them like 4 times and they managed to consistently pull off an exalt loop
only won once haha, but the consistency intrigued me

it boggled my mind i think i shared the comp here before lemme check

cause it got put back to your deck

that's kind of it?
example>

like, sometimes you paralyze an entire team, and then they just blow you up with a bunch of skills and exalts all at once, and then other times, you've paralyzed them since the time of the dinosaurs, and they never got their exalts, because they can't use their strikes
and other times, you dropped paralysis on Alva for one (1) turn, and she immediately blew up Tulu from full health with two cards
